sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104906" key="trie/lic" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρι-έλιξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῐκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n104906.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">triple wreath,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0328.tlg001:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7</biblScope> </bibl> (dub.).</sense> </entryFree>
